titleStmt.title: SII 11.100: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 100. (B.K. No. 163 of 1926-27). ASUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP ON A PLATFORM CALLED MALLADĒVIKAṬṬE OUTSIDE THE VILLAGE.

summary.p: This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I) and registers a gift of land made by the king's subordinate (name lost) to Śāntarāśi-Paṇḍita for lamps and offerings in a temple (the name of which is completely effaced). At the end of the inscription is the long praśasti of a certain Nākarasa who is described as a votary of the god Trikūṭēśvaradēva.

The record is dated Śaka [987], Viśvāvasu, Pushya, puṇṇame, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti. The details are irregular. In the year quoted, Pushya-puṇṇame fell on Thursday, 15th December, and the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti occurred on Friday, the 23rd December A.D. 1065. In the previous year (i.e. Śaka 986 = Krōdhin), Pushyapuṇṇame fell on Sunday, December 26, A.D. 1064, three days after the saṅkrānti (Thursday, December 23). Since the gift was made on account (nimittam) of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti the latter i.e. Sunday, December 26, A.D. 1064 appears to be the intended date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatraiḷōkyama
lladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti
damaged
duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanadindirddu sukhadi nāḷuttire 987 neya visvāvasu saṁvatsa
rada pauśyada puṇname Ādityavāra muttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntinimitta
mēsvarapaṇḍitara śiṣya yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāṇaparāya
ṇarappa sāntarāsipaṇḍitarige padaprakṣāḷana
dhanaṁgeydu dēgulada bhūmiya teṁka sarvvanamasyamāge dēvarige
dīpanivēdyakke mūvattumūṟu gēṇa gaḷeyoḷu biṭṭa
naiṣṭhikatapōdhanarggaṁ biṭṭa mattar 4 satrakke biṭṭa
rvvabādhāparihāramāge biṭṭar . Intīdharmmama nalliya
da rī dharmmamaṁ kādu naḍeyisidaṁge vā ṇāsiyoḷu kurukṣētradoḷ brāhmaṇarggaṁ Ekkōṭi tapō
dhanarggaṁ sāsirakavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponno ḷkaṭṭisi phala maku
dharmama naḷidaṁ bāṇarāsiyoḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷaṁ sāsirvvabrāhmaṇarumā sasira kavile
yama naḷida paṁcamahāpātaka rappar . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuttā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ ya
sya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣa
ṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnri pāṇāṁ kālē kālē pā
ḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
svasti samastaripusubhaṭakuṁbhikuṁbhastaḷa
putraṁ gōtrapavitraṁ Ārōhaka viṣamaturagarēvaṁtaṁ vijayaśrīkāṁtaṁ
patihitabhujāmaṇḍa nuḍidantagaṇḍaṁ kuṁjaraṁ saraṇāgata vajrapaṁjaraṁ Āśritajanakaḷpa
vrikṣaṁ sujanaykadakṣaṁ vinayamāndhātaṁ vidita prasaṅgaṁ gaḍiyaṁkasiṅgaṁ śivadharmmanirutaṁ
bandhujanavatsaḷaṁ trikūṭēsvaradēvapādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ jitavīrasamaraṁ vīrakhagavāhaṁ siṅga
sināmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmat nākarasar . mūṟulōkada biruda vārigaḷge baṅgāṟa cavōja . �
Digital edition of SII 11.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
